response.global_analysis: The audio is in English and matches the provided Reference JSON for the song 'X.U.' performed by IRyS and Hakos Baelz. I have transcribed the on-screen credits and the lyrics, ensuring timestamps are tightly aligned with the vocal delivery. Variations in the chorus lyrics ('One more baby' vs 'Torn or sepia') between the first and second cycles have been captured based on the audio truth. Continuous phrases were split at audible breaths to maintain precision and semantic continuity.

subtitles.original:
X.U.
Lyrics: Benjamin, mpi  Music: Hiroyuki Sawano
subtitles.english:
X.U.
Lyrics: Benjamin, mpi  Music: Hiroyuki Sawano

subtitles.original: I don't want nobody to get killed
subtitles.english: I don't want nobody to get killed

subtitles.original: I am always ready to fight
subtitles.english: I am always ready to fight

subtitles.original: So don't take all of the blame
subtitles.english: So don't take all of the blame

subtitles.original: Don't take all of the way you always do
subtitles.english: Don't take all of the way you always do

subtitles.original: There will always be something you cannot control
subtitles.english: There will always be something you cannot control

subtitles.original: You make me realize who I need
subtitles.english: You make me realize who I need

subtitles.original: The fallen angels you run with don't know
subtitles.english: The fallen angels you run with don't know

subtitles.original: It is our pain that makes us all human after all
subtitles.english: It is our pain that makes us all human after all

subtitles.original: One more baby, a photograph show
subtitles.english: One more baby, a photograph show

subtitles.original: Must protect it, respond to the call
subtitles.english: Must protect it, respond to the call

subtitles.original: Are they really deep inside your head?
subtitles.english: Are they really deep inside your head?

subtitles.original: Do they control you like a little marionette?
subtitles.english: Do they control you like a little marionette?

subtitles.original: I'll cut the strings off you dead
subtitles.english: I'll cut the strings off you dead

subtitles.original: The wings of your soul and make it fly
subtitles.english: The wings of your soul and make it fly

subtitles.original: We've been waiting here just to make you whole again
subtitles.english: We've been waiting here just to make you whole again

subtitles.original: See, I have always been your friend
subtitles.english: See, I have always been your friend

subtitles.original: You make me realize who I need
subtitles.english: You make me realize who I need

subtitles.original: The fallen angels you run with don't know
subtitles.english: The fallen angels you run with don't know

subtitles.original: It is our pain that makes us so human after all
subtitles.english: It is our pain that makes us so human after all

subtitles.original: Torn or sepia, a photograph show
subtitles.english: Torn or sepia, a photograph show

subtitles.original: Must discard it, respond to the call
subtitles.english: Must discard it, respond to the call

subtitles.original: If you want to fight with me
subtitles.english: If you want to fight with me

subtitles.original: Then go ahead and fight with me
subtitles.english: Then go ahead and fight with me

subtitles.original: If you want to fight with me
subtitles.english: If you want to fight with me

subtitles.original: Then go ahead and fight with me
subtitles.english: Then go ahead and fight with me

subtitles.original: Cause all I want to do is help you man
subtitles.english: Cause all I want to do is help you man

subtitles.original: You will be the death of me
subtitles.english: You will be the death of me

subtitles.original: The power of our army has been caught with us all
subtitles.english: The power of our army has been caught with us all

subtitles.original: And if we lose you too, then we may never survive
subtitles.english: And if we lose you too, then we may never survive

subtitles.english: Just one step at a time

subtitles.original: And keep your head up, boy,
